feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >”but muh aninime website!!!” An alarmingly-high percentage of those who consume…
entry.content: >”but muh aninime website!!!” An alarmingly-high percentage of those who consume anime and manga, have been deprived of the knowledge necessary to interact successfully with other human beings. Anime is nothing more than cartoons with featureless expressions, expressions that the audience often mimic and attempt to pass off as "socializing". More often than not, this is met with derision and scorn, as it should be. Those who watch anime have not matured. They are stuck in eternal limbo between c

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The Fable 5 situation is INSANE #ad
entry.content: I do not like anthropic. They were good, but the best use was with their opus on the 100$ a month plan. It was unable to solve some of the math equations I needed for my project after two months of nearly non stop work. Gemini was able to solve it. This put Gemini with ai studio far above any other model. Especially because of the high free usage tier and openai shooting itself in the dick by discontinuing their strongest model o1. Gemini then followed suit with multiple changes making it unusab

entry.content: >After School Lessons Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: GrapheneOS is a for-profit enterprise. Why? They rely 100% on donations. No dona…
entry.content: GrapheneOS is a for-profit enterprise. Why? They rely 100% on donations. No donations mean no project development. That is why GrapheneOS puts so much energy into PR. They have to convince people that their product is trustworthy, because that is the only way to bring in donations. Without donations, GrapheneOS is finished. Therefore, Micay’s obsessive posting is not the result of personal quirks, but actually the result of economic pressures. And precisely because it is impossible to empiricall

entry.title: /g/ Technology: My Home Studio
entry.content: Hey guys So i wanted to share with you the equipment i may buy for my future home studio Some of the choices here might be disappointment, and I'm really sorry for that My budget is very tight and that made me make some comprmises to the whole project I mainly picked the the Behringer XM8500 because it's a dynamic and there's no way i would even think about treating my room and buy a condenser microphone Also the 256gb on the laptop is quite the bottleneck as you see But I'm gonna remedy that wi

entry.content: Why aren't they making sex robots, to speed up the development of robotics? Theres tons of autists with with gross excess cash and a growing large number of dateless adult virgins. Doesn't it make sense to try to make and develop sex robotics with newer and refined technology? It doesnt even really have to be good at the thing it does. It could very well be a self sufficient way of progressing the development on robotics, to use else where. shit it would even help with making robots that are sup

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: DS3
entry.content: DS1: >Silver Knights are functionally extinct and only exist as a sham illusion to make people think Anor Londo is okay >this illusion has been going on for years and years DS3: >Everyone forgot that subtext so Silver Knights are back >And they have super cool new moves! DS3 takes the setting very literally, with no nuance.

entry.content: like python but >actually fast and not 'fast after you rewrite it in C' >no GIL >built-in package manager that just works with easily reproducible environments instead of pip/conda... shitfuckery >first class Unicode variable names >you can inspect and generate code without a PhD in ast >zero-cost abstractions Why does noone uses this outside universities

entry.title: /news/ News: Another Trump fuckup flares back up
entry.content: https://www.axios.com/2026/07/07/ir an-resumes-hormuz-attacks-us-offici als Iran's military fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz on Monday night, two U.S. officials tell Axios. The IRGC attacked a third commercial ship on Tuesday morning, a U.S. official said. Why it matters: The reported attacks threaten to unravel a memorandum of understanding signed less than three weeks ago under which Iran agreed to halt attacks in the Strait of Hormuz.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Browsers.
entry.content: So.. I remember years back that browsers when you right clicked did give you a key you cna press to download the selected picture. This was great since not only can oyu save time however also if you use a macro keyboard you can automate this to pressing only 1 button. Now it looks like the new and updooted version have removed this. Why? How do I get this functionality back in any browser? Running a old version is not an option since most websites will block you I presume.
